title: FLUSH
full_description: Three bathroom stalls in a Shoreditch nightclub. One night. Stories slip between the cracks of the cubicles: teenage drama, thirty-something fatigue, love, loss, career spirals, sex, motherhood, bad dates and worse decisions. At the heart of it all is Billie, who has just experienced something she can't quite name yet — and the bathroom becomes a strange kind of shelter. Winner of a Fringe Theatre Award, Bitesize Award for Best Direction, and one of the FT's top nine shows of the Fringe.
ai_summary: April Hope Miller's debut play — a warm, funny, and occasionally devastating ensemble piece set entirely in a nightclub bathroom — won a Fringe Theatre Award and a Bitesize Award for Best Direction. One of the most talked-about new plays of Fringe 2025.
